text:
The paper was found on Preprints.org with the exact title. The automated checkers noted that the actual authors are only Dongwen Luo and Weihao Pan (2 authors), while the citation lists 4 authors (adding Jiachen Zhong and Yiting Wang). The title is real, but the author list as cited includes fabricated co-authors not present in the actual paper.

VERDICT: LIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper exists on Preprints.org, but the automated checkers confirmed the actual authors are only Dongwen Luo and Weihao Pan — the two additional cited authors (Jiachen Zhong and Yiting Wang) are fabricated, making this a hallucinated reference with grafted author names.
LINK: https://www.preprints.org/manuscript/202412.0644
